claim_results.claim: The Master Equation makes specific quantitative predictions and the biblical/historical data fits them — including a near-perfect ρ = 0.988 between adversary sophistication and humanity's preparation level.
A model parameter became an empirical discovery.

We present 16 independent empirical tests of the Theophysics Master Equation $\chi = \iiint(G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C)\, dx\, dy\, dt$ and its derived coherence equation $\frac{dC}{dt} = O_{eff} \cdot G(t) \cdot (1-C) - S \cdot C$ against biblical and historical data.

Of nine completed tests, eight produce statistically significant results confirming framework predictions, including: (1) biblical lifespan data fitting a thermodynamic decay curve ($R^2 = 0.888$); (2) linguistic complexity across the biblical corpus increasing monotonically with all five metrics significant at $p < 10^{-10}$ and an S-curve fit of $R^2 = 0.90$; (3) adversary sophistication tracking preparation level with Spearman $\rho = 0.988$ ($p = 2.16 \times 10^{-9}$); (4) prophetic specificity increasing over time ($\rho = 0.764$, $p = 9.1 \times 10^{-4}$); (5) cumulative theological concepts following an S-curve ($R^2 = 0.956$); and (6) a constraint satisfaction model demonstrating the biblical pattern as uniquely optimal among six tested strategies under three non-negotiable constra
Introduction 1.1 The Problem The Theophysics framework proposes that physical and spiritual reality are dual projections of a single informational substrate described by the Master Equation.
This claim is either testable or it is philosophy.
The framework generates specific, quantitative predictions about patterns that should be observable in biblical and historical data if the model is correct.
These predictions are falsifiable: if the data contradicts the predictions, the model requires revision or rejection.
It models the claim that God’s revelation was progressive â€” calibrated to the species’ growing capacity to understand it.

If this claim is correct, $P(t)$ should be empirically visible in the biblical text itself as a monotonic increase in linguistic complexity, abstraction level, and conceptual density across the biblical timeline.

1.4 Three Hard Constraints The framework identifies three non-negotiable constraints governing any coherent divine strategy: Free Will (O): Must be genuine, never overridden or effectively drowned Grace (G): Must be always available ($G > 0$ for all $t$) Justice (SÂ·C): Consequences must be structural and real ($S > 0$) The constraint satisfaction model (Test C) demonstrates that these three constraints, taken together, produce a unique optimal strategy matching the biblical pattern.
64 CE 0.920 Model-to-empirical correlation: $r = 0.817$.
The preparation function is an empirical observation, not a model assumption.

3.4 Test C: Constraint Satisfaction Model Hypothesis: The biblical pattern (progressive revelation â†’ incarnation â†’ cross â†’ Spirit distribution) is the uniquely optimal strategy given three non-negotiable constraints.
Method: Six “God strategies” tested via ODE integration of the coherence equation:
Early periods (Flood, Abraham) show remarkably long stability at low $P(t)$, while the monarchy period shows shorter cycles at moderate $P(t)$.
The Spirit-distributed model at high $P$ achieves what institutional models at low $P$ could not sustain.
Full validation requires running the same analysis on control corpora (Greek philosophy, Chinese classics, comparative religious texts).

- Quran: FLAT (single author, short timespan, no progressive pedagogy) - Vedas: Different topology (increasing but non-monotonic, reflecting accumulation without curation) - Bible: Monotonic S-curve (unique preparation signature) Falsification: If another text shows the same monotonic S-curve pattern, the signal is not unique to the Bible.
Method: Composite measure from World Values Survey: life satisfaction + prosocial behavior + relationship stability + health outcomes.
Falsification: If the distribution is Gaussian, A12.1 (Bimodal Outcome) requires revision.
Method: Measure HRV, cortisol, EEG coherence before, during, and after reported conversion experiences.
Falsification: If physiological markers change gradually with no discontinuity, T11.3 (conversion as phase transition) requires revision.
Existing evidence: PEAR lab: $6.35\sigma$ across 2.5 million trials.
Falsification: If effect size does not scale with estimated $\Phi$, the observer-integration model requires revision.
Prediction: Apostates show WORSE outcomes than never-believers, because the transition from $\sigma = +1$ toward $\sigma = -1$ passes through maximum decoherence.
Falsification: If apostates show outcomes identical to never-believers, the sign-flip model is not supported.

The strongest results are: Sin complexity curve ($\rho = 0.988$, $p = 2.16 \times 10^{-9}$): Near-perfect rank correlation between adversary sophistication and species preparation level P(t) linguistic complexity (all metrics $p < 10^{-10}$, S-curve $R^2 = 0.90$): The preparation function is empirically visible in the biblical text Revelation density S-curve ($R^2 = 0.956$): Cumulative theological concepts follow the predicted S-curve Constraint satisfaction model : The biblical pattern is uniquely optimal among six strategies under three hard constraints 5.2 The Failed Test Test 4 (Grace Response Time) failed at $p = 0.91$.
This failure constrains the model: whatever drives post-intervention stability, it is not a simple function of preparation level alone.

The preparation function was not designed to match the data; it was proposed on theoretical grounds (the coherence equation requires it for dimensional consistency) and then found to match the data across five independent linguistic metrics.
This is the pattern that characterizes genuine prediction: the model specifies what should be true before the data is examined.

5.5 The Constraint Proof The constraint satisfaction model (Test C) addresses the most common objection to the framework: “Why not a simpler/better/kinder approach?” The answer is formal: given three non-negotiable constraints (free will, grace, justice), the biblical pattern is the unique optimum.
6.3 Model Parameters The constraint satisfaction model uses specific parameter values ($S = 0.3$, $O_{raw} = 0.5$, etc.) that are not independently measured.
Sensitivity analysis of constraint model across parameter ranges 7.2 Near-term (Requires existing external datasets)
7.3 Long-term (Requires original data collection)
The preparation function $P(t)$ emerges as an empirical discovery, not merely a model parameter.
The constraint satisfaction model demonstrates strategic uniqueness.

If the Bible’s preparation curve proves unique among major religious texts, the evidence transitions from “consistent with the model” to “uniquely predicted by the model.” All code, data, and results are available for independent reproduction.

Appendix C: Charts The following figures are generated by generate_all_charts.py and included in the repository: chart1_Pt_composite.png â€” Composite $P(t)$ with S-curve fit and era markers chart2_five_metrics.png â€” Individual metric trend lines with regression statistics chart3_era_progression.png â€” Era average bar chart showing monotonic increase chart4_constraint_model.png â€” Six strategy coherence trajectories with grace deployment chart5_efficiency.png â€” Grace efficiency and final coherence comparison chart6_model_vs_empirical.png â€” Model $P(t)$ overlaid on empirical data ($r = 0.817$) David Lowe (POF 2828)
Any claim that turns a structural resemblance into a proven mechanism belongs here until the math, experiment, or textual chain can carry the weight.
Possible overstatement: language that sounds final should be read as a working model unless the article explicitly proves it.

This paper runs 16 independent empirical tests of the Theophysics Master Equation against biblical and historical data; nine are completed computationally and seven are designed with falsification protocols awaiting external datasets.
A constraint-satisfaction ODE shows the biblical pattern is uniquely optimal among six divine strategies under three non-negotiable constraints.
Rigor & Kill Conditions Every claim is held to explicit falsification standards.
Kill if: The constraint-satisfaction model collapses under sensitivity analysis, or the χ-field cosmological predictions (w 0 = −1.28, w a = +0.70) are falsified by Euclid DR1 (October 2026).
Every equation that appears in the paper, collected here as a reference index.

Plain English: The framework's central claim — physical and spiritual reality are dual projections of a single informational substrate, expressed as the integral of ten coupled variables over space and time.
Coherence Equation (derived from the Master Equation) $$\frac{dC}{dt} = O_{\text{eff}} \cdot G(t) \cdot (1-C) - S \cdot C$$ C = coherence with the Logos source [0, 1].
This is the engine equation tested across nine biblical/historical datasets in this paper.
Both must be nonzero or the coherence equation flatlines.
Treated as testable rather than philosophical — if its predictions fail against data, the model requires revision.
The differential equation derived from the Master Equation that this paper tests against biblical and historical data.
One of three non-negotiable constraints on any coherent divine strategy in the constraint-satisfaction model.
The constraint requires G(t) > 0 for all t.
The downward-pulling term in the coherence equation.
Framework note: Sin (theological frame) and Entropy (physical frame) name the same dynamical quantity at the master-equation level.
Test C in this paper: six divine strategies (Dictator, Instant Fix, Biblical, Progressive, Constant Low, Absent) tested by ODE integration of the coherence equation.
Represented in the Master Equation as the $\chi$ field — the framework's pervasive coherence substrate.

Cited as one of the empirical anchors for the framework's coherence-coupling claim. (Defined in detail in Article 16.) Shannon (Information Theory) The information-theoretic backdrop the framework uses to quantify what counts as “coherent” signal versus noise.
Treated alongside thermodynamic entropy as one of the family of informational measures the equation operates on.
